title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Review suitability of the Google AI agents technical guidance for using Google agent tooling as the backend layer for Cursorvers.Inc. Focus on risks, lock-in, security, and what should not be delegated to agents. Findings first.
summary_text: 1. **Behavior regression risk if switched as-is:** `handleRiskChecker` has no blank-input guard, but wrapper validation rejects blank and throws. Current call path: [index.ts:802](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:802). Wrapper validator: [cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:36](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:36). Caller-visible impact: `check:` with empty body becomes generic error instead of guided input message. 2. **Length-limit mismatch can surface as generic failures:** webhook gate uses env `MAX_INPUT_LENGTH`, wrapper hard-caps at 3000. Webhook limit: [index.ts:125](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:125), [index.ts:760](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:760). Wrapper cap: [cursorvers-wrapper-contracts.ts:8](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-contracts.ts:8). Caller-visible impact: input allowed by webhook but >3000 will throw in wrapper and hit generic catch. 3. **Error-field contract must change at call site:** wrapper returns `userError`, current risk handler expects `error`. Wrapper failure shape: [cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:40). Current handler branch: [index.ts:808](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:808). Caller-visible impact if not adapted: specific messages (429, key-missing) degrade to generic error. 4. **Existing message-size/duplication issue remains:** risk message already includes Discord footer, and handler appends another one. Footer in risk checker: [risk-checker.ts:396](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/risk-checker.ts:396). Extra append in handler: [index.ts:805](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:805). Caller-visible impact: duplicated footer and larger push payload risk. 5. **Test gap at integration boundary:** no test appears to cover `handleRiskChecker` behavior in `index.ts`; existing tests mainly target lib/wrapper units. **Decision** - **Do not switch `handleRiskChecker` to wrapper “now” as a one-line swap.** - **Switch next only as a tiny parity bundle** (blank-input guard like prompt path, aligned length handling, `userError` mapping). Prompt precedent for blank guard: [index.ts:674](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:674). **Lane compliance note** - This review was single-lane Codex only; your policy requires multi-lane adjudication for final recommendation.
